What is the most promising country or city in the world,regarding Krishna Consciousness?

Social · asked by user [] · 2007-11-01 · 5 answers
For those who have travelled a lot!
user [19] · 2007-11-05
india is strong too
user [38] · 2007-11-02
I guess you answered yourself in http://www.pariprashnena.com/discussion/379/
user [194] · 2007-11-02
[quote][cite] VEDA:[/cite]I guess you answered yourself in http://www.pariprashnena.com/discussion/379/[/quote]

Mauritius escaped the tsunami of guru falldowns-Bhagavan das was GBC there] as they took shelter of other gurus immediately,and carried on with serving the Lord,without interruption,whereas in other countries,they went to the material world or to Gaudiya Matha.As the country is small,it is not difficult to get the attention of all population through the medias,and in a matter of years,there should be politicians with tilak on the forehead.For this to happen,the country needs expert foreign devotees association,as so make Prabhupadas prediciton come true.
Materially,the little country is also doing well-2nd in Africa!-
Projects possible:self-sufficient farms,dairy business,hotels for vegetarians,handicrafts...
ps. Regarding other countries,is Manipura regarded as a KC country?

http://servihoo.com [Mauritius]
user [188] · 2007-11-04
While some are doing better than others at the moment, id say all countries are the most promising :)
user [181] · 2007-11-07
Bhagwan Krusna without Radha cannot be imagined is a well known fact. Which is the country where Radha comes before Krishna? undoubtedly, it is India. In Vrindavan, people call Radhe Radhe and then only Krsna. So is in other parts of the country also. India being the origin of Bhagwan Krishna, people here are the most Krishna consious and at the same time conscience too.
